completed_slice.name: continuous Cloudflare deployment configuration parity gate
completed_slice.description: Committed a dedicated GitHub Actions workflow that tests the parity evaluator, evaluates the production Pages project/output/branch/commit contract, uploads a bounded JSON evidence artifact, and runs whenever the relevant deployment configuration changes.
completed_slice.verification: Four deterministic Node tests passed and the current declared project/output/branch/commit contract evaluated accepted=true in an isolated runtime. No remote workflow run was observed for the workflow commit.

remaining_blocker: Configure the cloudflare-research GitHub environment with CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN, dispatch the production deployment workflow, and retain provider-returned deployment identity, resolving HTTPS URL, served research-surface identity, and exact deployed commit evidence.
next_action: Observe the first remote cloudflare-config-parity workflow run and artifact; then add the same validator invocation to the production deployment workflow's pre-deployment contract stage so deployment itself is fail-closed on parity.
